activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters
activities.description: Get the parameters to be used in this pipeline

oracleReaderQuery.value:
select LP_ID,
LN_ID,
LST_ID,
STAT_ID,
IDENT,
DP_ID,
PROJ_ID,
LIST_STATUS,
ISSUE_STATUS,
POS,
IDENT_CODE,
TAG_NUMBER,
IDENT_DESCRIPTION,
QUANTITY,
QTY_UNIT,
ITEM_TYPE,
CG_GROUP_CODE,
PART_CODE,
COMMODITY_CODE,
SIZE1,
SIZE2,
SIZE3,
POS_TAG_LO,
POS_TAG_SH,
UNIT_WGHT,
DWG_DESCRIPTION,
BOM_CNTNO,
STRUCTURE_CODE,
ACTIVITY_CODE,
STR_ACTIVITY_DESC,
BID_ELEMENT,
LEVEL_,
MEMBER_DESC,
LOCATION,
MATL_CLASSIFICATION,
PIECE_MARK,
NO_PC_REQD,
DIM1,
DIM2,
ROLL_PLATE_Y_N,
MATL_STATUS,
DIM_X,
DIM_Y,
BOM_SFI,
BOM_FIM,
BOM_HOLD,
UNIT_WGHT_UOM,
MTO_WEIGHT_MT,
UNIT_PA,
TOTAL_PA,
REMARKS,
MP_REQ_NO,
MP_SEQ_NO,
XS_COMPONENT,
XS_VENDOR_NAME,
XS_ORDERING_OPTION,
MP_SELECT_PRIO,
MP_DELV_DESIG,
MP_SELECT_CWP,
MP_ROS_DATE,
MP_FAB_LOCATION,
MP_DRWG_NAME,
MP_SERVICE,
MP_SFI,
MP_CATEGORY,
MP_WEIGHT,
XS_STRUC_CODE,
POS_ITR,
DISCIPLINE,
MTO_TYPE,
UNIT,
AREA_CWA,
XS_ACTIVITY_CODE,
GROUP_NAME,
BOM_SHAPE_SPOOL,
m_sys.m_pck_bom.list_path_to_root (ln_id, '/') bom_path -- added latter
 from MDR_CUST.MDR_M_EPI_010_REP_NEW where proj_id = '@{pipeline().parameters.proj_id}'

select m.*
, MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(m.ln_id,'MTO_TYPE') mto_type 
, m_sys.m_pck_bom.list_path_to_root (ln_id, '/') bom_path -- added latter
from MDR_CUST.MDR_M_EPI_011_REP_NEW m where m.proj_id = '@{pipeline().parameters.proj_id}'

select m.*
, MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(m.ln_id,'MTO_TYPE') mto_type 
, m_sys.m_pck_bom.list_path_to_root (ln_id, '/') bom_path -- added latter
from MDR_CUST.MDR_M_EPI_012_REP_NEW m where m.proj_id = '@{pipeline().parameters.proj_id}'

select m.*
, MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(m.ln_id,'MTO_TYPE') mto_type 
, m_sys.m_pck_bom.list_path_to_root (ln_id, '/') bom_path -- added latter
from MDR_CUST.MDR_M_EPI_013_REP_NEW m where m.proj_id  = '@{pipeline().parameters.proj_id}'

SELECT o1."LP_ID",o1."LST_ID",o1."STAT_ID",o1."IDENT",o1."DP_ID",o1."LN_ID",o1."SPEC_HEADER_ID",o1."PROJ_ID",o1."LIST_STATUS",o1."ISSUE_STATUS",o1."POS",o1."IDENT_CODE",o1."TAG_NUMBER",o1."IDENT_DESCRIPTION",o1."QUANTITY",o1."SHORT_CODE",o1."OPTION_CODE",o1."SPEC_CODE",o1."SIZE1",o1."SIZE2",o1."SIZE3",o1."UNIT",o1."UNIT_WGHT",o1."BOM_CNTNO",o1."BOM_SFI",o1."BOM_HOLD",o1."BOM_PRESERVATION",o1."BOM_CLIMATE_CONTROL",o1."CLIENT_PRICE_BREAKDOWN",o1."UNIT_WGHT_UOM",o1."REMARKS",o1."XS_TYPE",o1."ITEM_TYPE",o1."MP_SIZE1",o1."MP_SIZE2",o1."MP_SIZE3",o1."MP_SIZE4",o1."MP_SIZE5",o1."XS_ACTIVITY_CODE",o1."XS_ACTIVITY_DESC",o1."MP_SELECT_PRIO",o1."MP_DELV_DESIG",o1."MP_ROS_DATE",o1."MP_FAB_LOCATION",o1."MP_SELECT_CWA",o1."MP_SELECT_CWP",o1."MP_SELECT_WBS",o1."MP_SELECT_IWP",o1."MP_PROCESS_LINE",o1."XS_DRAWING_NUMBER",o1."MP_DRWG_NAME",o1."DRAWING_REV",o1."MP_SEQ_NO",o1."POS_ITR",o1."MAIN_CONN_NUM",o1."MAIN_CONN_TYPE",o1."MAIN_CONN_LOC",o1."REDUCED_CONN_NUM",o1."REDUCED_CONN_TYPE",o1."REDUCED_CONN_LOC",o1."COMMODITY",o1."PAINT_CODE",o1."RTRREQ",o1."LPIREQ",o1."MPIREQ",o1."PWHT",
discipline, type, Unit_module_group, Area_cwa_deck, Element,Bom_drawing_no,
MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(o1.ln_id,'MTO_TYPE') mto_type,
bom_path -- added latter
FROM
    (SELECT lp.lp_id, lp.lst_id, lp.stat_id, lp.ident, lp.dp_id,
      lp.ln_id, lp.spec_header_id,
      lp.proj_id,
      lst_code list_status,
      ms.status issue_status,
      lp.lp_pos pos,
      ident_code,
      lp.tag_number,
      m_sys.m_pck_std_custom.ident_desc(lp.ident, 1) ident_description,
      lp.quantity,
      lp.short_code,
      lp.option_code,
      (SELECT sh.spec_code FROM  m_sys.m_spec_headers sh WHERE lp.spec_header_id = sh.spec_header_id) spec_code,
      lp.input_1 size1,
      lp.input_2 size2,
      lp.input_3 size3,
      (SELECT unit_code FROM m_sys.m_units un WHERE un.unit_id=lp.unit_id) unit,
	        (SELECT ity_code FROM m_sys.m_item_types WHERE ity_id=lp.ity_id) ITEM_TYPE, --added later
      DECODE((SELECT cg_group_code
          FROM m_sys.M_COMMODITY_GROUPS g,m_sys.m_commodity_codes c,m_sys.m_idents i
          WHERE g.group_id = c.group_id
          AND c.commodity_id = i.commodity_id
          AND i.ident=lp.ident),'TP',
         (SELECT attr_value
          FROM m_sys.M_IDENT_VALUES iv,m_sys.m_attrs a
          WHERE iv.ident =lp.ident
          AND a.attr_id=iv.attr_id
          AND attr_code='WEIGHT_UNIT'
          AND rownum=1),
     (SELECT  gd.output_1
      FROM m_sys.m_geom_details gd,m_sys.m_commodity_geometric_relation gr, m_sys.m_idents i
         WHERE gr.commodity_id =i.commodity_id
         AND i.ident =lp.ident
         AND gr.gn_id IN (SELECT gn_id FROM m_sys.m_geom_names WHERE gn_code LIKE '%WGHT%')
         AND gd.gn_id = gr.gn_id AND i.commodity_id =gr.commodity_id AND i.input_1 = gd.input_1
         AND  i.input_2 = gd.input_2 AND  i.input_3 = gd.input_3 AND  i.input_4 = gd.input_4
         AND  i.input_5 = gd.input_5 AND ROWNUM=1)) unit_wght,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'BOM_CNTNO') bom_cntno,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'BOM_SFI') bom_sfi,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'BOM_HOLD') bom_hold,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'BOM_PRESERVATION') bom_preservation,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'BOM_CLIM_CONT_STOR') bom_climate_control,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'CLIENT_PRICE_BREAKDOWN') client_price_breakdown,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_IDENT_CMS_ATTR_VAL(lp.ident,'XS_WEIGHT_UNIT','N') unit_wght_uom,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'REMARKS') remarks,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'XS_TYPE') XS_TYPE,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_SIZE1') MP_SIZE1,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_SIZE2') MP_SIZE2,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_SIZE3') MP_SIZE3,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_SIZE4') MP_SIZE4,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_SIZE5') MP_SIZE5,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'XS_ACTIVITY_CODE') XS_ACTIVITY_CODE,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'XS_ACTIVITY_DESC') XS_ACTIVITY_DESC,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_SELECT_PRIO') MP_SELECT_PRIO,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_DELV_DESIG') MP_DELV_DESIG,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_ROS_DATE') MP_ROS_DATE,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_FAB_LOCATION') MP_FAB_LOCATION,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_SELECT_CWA') MP_SELECT_CWA,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_SELECT_CWP') MP_SELECT_CWP,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_SELECT_WBS') MP_SELECT_WBS,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_SELECT_IWP') MP_SELECT_IWP,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_PROCESS_LINE') MP_PROCESS_LINE,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'XS_DRAWING_NUMBER') XS_DRAWING_NUMBER,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_DRWG_NAME') MP_DRWG_NAME,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'DRAWING REV') DRAWING_REV,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MP_SEQ') MP_SEQ_NO,
     m_sys.m_pck_bom.list_path_to_root (ln.ln_id, '/') bom_path, -- added latter
	 --below added later
	  MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'ITEM_TYPE') POS_ITR,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MAIN_CONN_NUM') MAIN_CONN_NUM,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MAIN_CONN_TYPE') MAIN_CONN_TYPE,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MAIN_CONN_LOC') MAIN_CONN_LOC,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'RED_CONN_NUM') REDUCED_CONN_NUM,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'RED_CONN_TYPE') REDUCED_CONN_TYPE,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'RED_CONN_LOC') REDUCED_CONN_LOC,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'COMMODITY') COMMODITY,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'PAINT CODE') PAINT_CODE,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'RTRREQ') RTRREQ,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'LPIREQ') LPIREQ,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'MPIREQ') MPIREQ,
      MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_LP_ATTR_VALUE(lp.lp_id,'PWHT') PWHT   
    FROM m_sys.m_list_nodes ln, m_sys.m_list_pos lp, m_sys.m_status ms, m_sys.m_idents inn, m_sys.m_list_status lst, m_sys.m_spec_headers sh
    WHERE lp.dp_id    = (SELECT dp_id FROM m_sys.m_disciplines WHERE dp_code = 'PIPING')
    AND   ln.proj_id  = lp.proj_id
    AND   ln.ln_id    = lp.ln_id
    AND   lp.stat_id  = ms.stat_id
    AND   lp.ident    = inn.ident
    AND   lp.lst_id   = lst.lst_id
    AND   lp.spec_header_id = sh.spec_header_id(+)
    AND (sh.spr_id = (SELECT MAX(spr_id)
                      FROM m_sys.m_spec_headers sh2
                      WHERE sh2.proj_id = lp.proj_id
                      AND  sh.spec_code  = sh2.spec_code) OR sh.spr_id is NULL)
   AND ln.proj_id = '@{pipeline().parameters.proj_id}') o1,
    (SELECT *
     FROM (
         SELECT ln.ln_id, ln.proj_id,
                MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'DISCIPLINE') discipline,
                MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'TYPE') Type,
                (Case When MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'UNIT') is not null then MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'UNIT')
                When MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'MODULE') is not null then MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'MODULE')
                When MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'GROUP') is not null then MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'GROUP')
                else '' END) Unit_module_group,
                (Case When MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'AREA') is not null then MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'AREA')
                When MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'CWA') is not null then MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'CWA')
                When MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'DECK') is not null then MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'DECk')
                else '' END) Area_cwa_deck,
               -- MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'ELEMENT') Element,
			   (Case When MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'ELEMENT')is not null then MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'ELEMENT')
                      When MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'P_LINE')is not null then MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'P_LINE')
                 ELSE '' END) Element,
                (Case When MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'BOM')is not null then MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'BOM')
                      When MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'DRAWING_NO') is not null then MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'DRAWING_NO')
					  When MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'SPOOL') is not null then MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_DYNAMIC_MAX_NODE_INFO(ln.ln_id,'SPOOL')
                ELSE '' END) Bom_drawing_no
         FROM m_sys.m_list_nodes ln
         WHERE 1=1
         AND ln.proj_id = '@{pipeline().parameters.proj_id}'
         AND ln.ln_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT ln_id FROM m_sys.m_list_pos lp1 WHERE lp1.dp_id IN (SELECT dp_id FROM m_sys.m_disciplines WHERE dp_code IN ('PIPING')))
         )
    ) o2
WHERE o1.ln_id   = o2.ln_id
AND   o1.proj_id = o2.proj_id
AND   o1.stat_id  = MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_BEST_QUANTITY(o1.proj_id,o1.dp_id, o1.ln_id) -- filter by Best Quantity
ORDER BY discipline, type, Unit_module_group, Area_cwa_deck, Element,Bom_drawing_no, TO_NUMBER(pos)

text.value: @concat('delete from [epr].[',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters_2').output.firstRow.table_name1,']',' where PROJ_ID = ''',pipeline().parameters.proj_id,''' and LIST_STATUS = ''','10-EST',''' and month_end_date <> (select min(month_end_date) from [epr].[',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters_2').output.firstRow.table_name1,'] where PROJ_ID = ','''',pipeline().parameters.proj_id,''')')
